# glad (vendored)

This directory contains a vendored copy of [**glad**](https://github.com/Dav1dde/glad),
an OpenGL function loader. It is built as a small static library by the sample's
`CMakeLists.txt`, so the project needs no package manager (vcpkg/apt/brew) to provide a
GL loader on any platform.

## Files

| File | Origin |
|------|--------|
| `include/glad/glad.h`, `src/glad.c` | Generated by **glad 0.1.36** (loader, Specification: `gl`, `APIs: gl=4.6`, Profile: compatibility). The sample only uses GL 3.3-core entry points; they are resolved at runtime via `gladLoadGLLoader(glfwGetProcAddress)`. |
| `include/KHR/khrplatform.h` | The Khronos platform header, included by glad. Maintained in the [Khronos EGL-Registry](https://github.com/KhronosGroup/EGL-Registry). |

These were generated by the glad tool (the same output vcpkg's `glad` port produces);
they can be regenerated at <https://glad.dav1d.de/> with the settings above.

## Licenses

All permissive; no copyleft.

- **glad** — the generator is licensed **MIT**, and glad releases its **generated code**
  (`glad.c` / `glad.h`) under permissive / public-domain terms ("do whatever you want").
  See the glad repository for details: <https://github.com/Dav1dde/glad>.
- **`khrplatform.h`** — **Khronos Group MIT-style license** (Copyright © 2008–2018 The
  Khronos Group Inc.; the full notice is retained at the top of the file). Permissive;
  the only obligation is to keep that copyright/permission notice in the file.
- The OpenGL function/enum **definitions** embedded by glad are derived from the Khronos
  OpenGL registry (`gl.xml`), licensed **Apache-2.0 / MIT** by Khronos.

These terms nest cleanly under this repository's Apache-2.0 license.
